commands.review_summary:
The PR tries to normalize Feishu fetched quoted-message mention placeholders and also changes command authorization, config-write policy, browser auth, cron cleanup, health status merging, device bootstrap behavior, dependencies, tests, and changelog entries.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction is to mock Feishu im.message.get or im.message.list with body.content containing @_user_1 plus item-level mentions; current main parses only raw content and ignores that metadata.
commands.review_followup: Needs human PR handling because the external contributor must provide real Feishu behavior proof and the branch should be narrowed or split before any merge path; automation cannot supply contributor-side proof.
